# ErgoRemote — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org standard

> ErgoRemote is a home office ergonomics review site. All content is written by Alex Sabr, a remote worker and software developer who has tested ergonomic gear since 2021. No sponsored reviews.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://ergoremote.com/
- About the author: https://ergoremote.com/about/
